case_title: TOMAS PENA VS. ANA LUISA ISIDRO

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $388.77 FILED BY PENA, TOMAS DBA LATIN JEWELERS AS TO DEFENDANT ISIDRO, ANA LUISA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-16-2008 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JAN-02-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-16-2008 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PENA, TOMAS DBA LATIN JEWELERS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ISIDRO, ANA LUISA $238.78 PRINCIPAL, $67.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $306.28, DEFENDANT ANA LUISA ISIDRO NOT PRESENT.
